ext.description: A capybara pet that lives in a panel of your editor: it walks, runs while you type, gets scared by errors, sips coffee, and sleeps.
cmd.show.title: Show the Capybara
cmd.pet.title: Pet the Capybara
cmd.toggle.title: Show/Hide the Capybara
config.title: Capibara Pet
config.enabled.desc: Show the capybara. Turn off to hide it without uninstalling.
config.size.desc: Size of the capybara, in pixels.
config.speed.desc: Movement speed multiplier for walking and running (`1` = default).
config.coffeeAfterSeconds.desc: Seconds of inactivity before the capybara takes a coffee break.
config.sleepAfterSeconds.desc: Seconds of inactivity before the capybara falls asleep.
config.reactToErrors.desc: Whether the capybara gets scared when the active file has errors.
config.reactToDebug.desc: Whether the capybara celebrates when a debug session starts.
config.name.desc: Give your capybara a name. Shown as a tooltip on hover and in the status bar.
config.bubbles.desc: Show small speech bubbles (e.g. when saving, sleeping, or petting).
config.statusBar.desc: Show a status bar item that mirrors the capybara's current mood.
